title: Harry Potter and the Deathly Hallows: Part 1
posterAlt: Harry Potter and the Deathly Hallows: Part 1 (2010) movie poster
tmdbOverview: Harry, Ron and Hermione walk away from their last year at Hogwarts to find and destroy the remaining Horcruxes, putting an end to Voldemort's bid for immortality. But with Harry's beloved Dumbledore dead and Voldemort's unscrupulous Death Eaters on the loose, the world is more dangerous than ever.
synopsis: Harry Potter and the Deathly Hallows: Part 1 is a 2010 adventure and fantasy film from United Kingdom and United States. It holds a solid 7.7 rating on IMDb. A standout of 2010s cinema, it earns its spot on our lists. It carries a PG-13 certification (US rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
